# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

// MinSizeRel ...

//CXX compiler

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//Enforce cody style with clang-format
NS3_CLANG_FORMAT:BOOL=OFF

//Use clang-tidy static analysis
NS3_CLANG_TIDY:BOOL=OFF

//Collect compilation statistics to analyze the build process
NS3_CLANG_TIMETRACE:BOOL=OFF

//Colorize CMake messages
NS3_COLORED_OUTPUT:BOOL=OFF

//Enable code coverage measurements and report generation
NS3_COVERAGE:BOOL=OFF

//Zero lcov counters before running. Requires NS3_COVERAGE=ON
NS3_COVERAGE_ZERO_COUNTERS:BOOL=OFF

//Enable the CPM C++ library manager support
NS3_CPM:BOOL=OFF

//Enable DES Metrics event collection
NS3_DES_METRICS:BOOL=OFF

//List of modules to disable (e.g. lte;wimax)
NS3_DISABLED_MODULES:STRING=

//Enable fd-net-device DPDK features
NS3_DPDK:BOOL=OFF

//Build with Eigen support
NS3_EIGEN:BOOL=ON

//Build with emulation support
NS3_EMU:BOOL=ON

//List of modules to enable (e.g. core;network;internet)
NS3_ENABLED_MODULES:STRING=core\;network\;internet\;mobility\;applications\;point-to-point\;buildings\;antenna\;stats\;flow-monitor\;config-store\;propagation\;spectrum\;nr

//Embed version info into libraries
NS3_ENABLE_BUILD_VERSION:BOOL=OFF

//Set executables ownership to root and enable the SUID flag
NS3_ENABLE_SUDO:BOOL=OFF

//Enable examples to be built
NS3_EXAMPLES:BOOL=ON

//Use Mold or LLD to speed up linking if available
NS3_FAST_LINKERS:BOOL=ON

//Fetch Brite, Click and Openflow dependencies
NS3_FETCH_OPTIONAL_COMPONENTS:BOOL=OFF

//List of modules that should have their examples and tests built
// (e.g. lte;wifi)
NS3_FILTER_MODULE_EXAMPLES_AND_TESTS:STRING=

//Only search applications, headers, libraries on explicitly set
// directories
NS3_FORCE_LOCAL_DEPENDENCIES:BOOL=OFF

//Build with GSL support
NS3_GSL:BOOL=ON

//Build with GTK3 support
NS3_GTK3:BOOL=ON

//Use IWYU to determine unnecessary headers included
NS3_INCLUDE_WHAT_YOU_USE:BOOL=OFF

//Int64x64 implementation
NS3_INT64X64:STRING=INT128

//Value Computed by CMake
NS3_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=ON

//Build with link-time optimization
NS3_LINK_TIME_OPTIMIZATION:BOOL=OFF

//Use LWYU to determine unnecessary linked libraries
NS3_LINK_WHAT_YOU_USE:BOOL=OFF

//Enable logging to be built
NS3_LOG:BOOL=OFF

//Build a single shared ns-3 library and link it against executables
NS3_MONOLIB:BOOL=OFF

//Build with MPI support
NS3_MPI:BOOL=OFF

//Build with -march=native -mtune=native
NS3_NATIVE_OPTIMIZATIONS:BOOL=OFF

//Build netanim
NS3_NETANIM:BOOL=OFF

//Use ninjatracing to convert Ninja's build log to the about://tracing

NS3_NINJA_TRACING:BOOL=OFF

NS3_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY:STRING=build

//Control aspects related to pip wheel packaging

NS3_PRECOMPILE_HEADERS:BOOL=OFF

NS3_PYTHON_BINDINGS:BOOL=OFF

NS3_SANITIZE:BOOL=OFF

//Build with memory sanitizer
NS3_SANITIZE_MEMORY:BOOL=OFF

//Enable the Vcpkg C++ library manager support

//list of c++ executables without version prefix and build suffix
ns3-execs-clean:INTERNAL=perf-io;print-introspected-doxygen;bench-packets;bench-scheduler;test-runner;scratch_subdir_scratch-subdir;scratch_nested-subdir_scratch-nested-subdir-executable;scratch_scratch-simulator;udp-trace-client-server;udp-client-server;udp-echo;seventh;sixth;fifth;fourth;second;first;hello-simulator;cobalt-vs-codel;tbf-example;queue-discs-benchmark;traffic-control-example;dctcp-example;tcp-validation;tcp-linux-reno;tcp-pacing;tcp-variants-comparison;tcp-pcap-nanosec-example;tcp-bulk-send;tcp-bbr-example;tcp-star-server;tcp-large-transfer;socket-options-ipv6;socket-options-ipv4;socket-bound-tcp-static-routing;socket-bound-static-routing;simple-multicast-flooding;global-routing-multi-switch-plus-router;rip-simple-network;ripng-simple-network;simple-routing-ping6;mixed-global-routing;simple-alternate-routing;simple-global-routing;global-injection-slash32;global-routing-slash32;static-routing-slash32;dynamic-global-routing;realtime-udp-echo;object-names;fragmentation-ipv6-PMTU;test-ipv6;radvd-two-prefix;radvd-one-prefix;ping6-example;loose-routing-ipv6;icmpv6-redirect;fragmentation-ipv6-two-MTU;fragmentation-ipv6;simple-error-model;three-gpp-v2v-channel-example;csma-ping;csma-raw-ip-socket;csma-multicast;csma-packet-socket;csma-broadcast;csma-one-subnet;virtual-net-device-example;dhcp-example;fqcodel-l4s-example;pie-example;codel-vs-pfifo-asymmetric;codel-vs-pfifo-basic-test;adaptive-red-tests;red-tests;csma-bridge-one-hop;csma-bridge;file-helper-example;file-aggregator-example;gnuplot-helper-example;gnuplot-aggregator-example;double-probe-example;gnuplot-example;time-probe-example;three-gpp-ntn-channel-example;tv-trans-regional-example;tv-trans-example;adhoc-aloha-ideal-phy-with-microwave-oven;adhoc-aloha-ideal-phy-matrix-propagation-loss-model;adhoc-aloha-ideal-phy;jakes-propagation-model-example;main-propagation-loss;main-attribute-value;nr-print-introspected-doxygen;cttc-nr-multi-flow-qos-sched;cttc-nr-simple-qos-sched;traffic-generator-example;cttc-nr-traffic-3gpp-xr;cttc-nr-traffic-ngmn-mixed;cttc-nr-notching;rem-beam-example;rem-example;cttc-channel-randomness;cttc-error-model-comparison;cttc-error-model-amc;cttc-error-model;cttc-nr-demo;cttc-lte-ca-demo;cttc-nr-cc-bwp-demo;cttc-3gpp-channel-nums-fdm;cttc-3gpp-channel-nums;cttc-3gpp-indoor-calibration;cttc-3gpp-channel-simple-fdm;cttc-3gpp-channel-simple-ran;cttc-3gpp-channel-example;lollipop-comparisons;packet-socket-apps;main-packet-tag;main-packet-header;bit-serializer;reference-point-group-mobility-example;mobility-trace-example;main-grid-topology;ns2-mobility-trace;main-random-walk;main-random-topology;constant-mobility-example;bonnmotion-ns2-example;neighbor-cache-dynamic;neighbor-cache-example;main-simple;log-example;empirical-random-variable-example;main-test-sync;main-random-variable-stream;test-string-value-formatting;system-path-examples;sample-simulator;sample-show-progress;sample-random-variable-stream;sample-random-variable;sample-log-time-format;main-ptr;main-callback;length-example;hash-example;fatal-example;command-line-example;assert-example;config-store-save;outdoor-random-walk-example;outdoor-group-mobility-example;buildings-pathloss-profiler;three-gpp-http-example;adjacency-matrix-example;

//list of non-ns libraries to link to NS3_STATIC and NS3_MONOLIB

//list of processed upstream modules

ns3-optional-visualizer-lib:INTERNAL=

stacktrace_flags-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
